data.title: Microservices
data.description: Instagram employs a microservices architecture to manage different functionalities independently.
data.technical_spec: Containerization using Docker and orchestration through Kubernetes.

data.title: GraphQL API
data.description: Utilizes GraphQL for data querying across web and mobile platforms.
data.technical_spec: Runs on Node.js with a backend written in Python and Java.

data.title: CDN Usage
data.description: Content Delivery Networks are used to ensure fast content delivery across the globe.
data.technical_spec: Integration with Akamai or Cloudflare for global edge delivery.

data.title: Data Storage
data.description: Hybrid approach using on-premise databases and cloud storage for flexibility and scale.
data.technical_spec: Primary data storage in PostgreSQL with S3 buckets for media storage.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Employs load balancing to manage high traffic efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Nginx/HAProxy used as load balancers to distribute traffic evenly.
